description: Deed of remittance, dated 3 Shevat 5316 (= 1556 CE) between Isaac b. ʿOvadya and Zephaniah b. Ḥayyim Saragossi (סרגוסי), possibly including the former's brother-in-law, Yaʿir. Location: Damietta (Dimyāṭ). The remittance is from business dealings and debts, including the proceeds of a sale of barrels of wine in Egypt. Signed by ʿOvadya ha-Levi Rofe (a common Karaite surname) and Nathan b. Makhlūf. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
